title: End Taxpayer Funding for Abortion Providers Act
short_title: End Taxpayer Funding for Abortion Providers Act
stage_label: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
crs_summary: End Taxpayer Funding for Abortion Providers Act This bill prohibits federal funding for entities, or their affiliates, that perform abortions, provide referrals for abortions, or provide funding to others that perform abortions. It provides exceptions for abortions (1) in the case of rape or incest, or (2) when a physician certifies there is a danger of death to the woman without an abortion.  The bill’s prohibition applies to any federal statutory law adopted after the bill’s effective date, unless such law contains an explicit exemption.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
